sources.description: Authoritative visible group-stage schedule; date/time headers are cached formulas.
Authoritative bracket schedule; dated slots remain records when future participants are unpublished.

date.description: Local match date parsed from the cached schedule header.

time.description: Local match time parsed from the cached schedule header.

team_a.description: First team parsed from the visible 'A vs B' cell.

team_b.description: Second team parsed from the visible 'A vs B' cell.

stage.description: Stable phase label from the Group Stage sheet.

bo.description: INFO!A15 states all group-stage matches are Bo3.

match_label.description: Group identifier from the schedule header.

metadata.notes: Draft for the effective NETO v2 runtime. Uses cached values from the formula-backed Group Stage and Play-Off sheets. The workbook labels July times as CET; Europe/Berlin is a proposed civil-time mapping and requires owner confirmation because fixed CET (UTC+1) would shift every UTC result by one hour. Playoff record sets are declared in event chronology because the source is a spatial bracket.
